subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath spoken forth a Word, and lo, it appeared in exalted station in the form of man. Blessed be the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تکلم بکلمه و انها ظهرت فی مقام علی هیئه الانسان تبارک الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @procession; appearance of the Word from God, @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @naming of children; of individuals
